content.en:
Since Ye Tian had only completed seventy percent of the inscription level, and had not completed the complete inscription, he could not get additional rewards.

But being able to complete the assessment, Ye Tian was very satisfied.

After all, the strength of his immortal soul was not very strong, although it was more powerful than other great god levels, but it was not as strong as the immortal souls or souls of those galaxy level and even cosmic god powerhouses.

He was able to pass the fourth round of assessment, and he had already surpassed everyone in the ghost clan.

Such an achievement is so high, what is he sorry for.

"The fourth round of assessment has been completed, and the fifth round of assessment is about to take place!"

The voice of the machine spirit came.

Ye Tian settled his mind and waited for the arrival of the fifth round of assessment.

Wow!

Void Transformation.

Ye Tian suddenly came to a void, and suddenly countless figures appeared.

At first, Ye Tian thought that these people were his assessment objects, but he soon found that the figures of these people were extremely illusory, not in the soul body state, but in the phantom state.

That is, these people are not real beings.

And among these people, there are different races, but most of them are like machine spirits, and they are obviously people of the Hades civilization.

"The way of the spirit, in its ultimate form, can be pinned on the void and eternal in the world......"

Lang Lang's voice pierced the void.

Ye Tian found that many people were sitting cross-legged, listening to the sermon of a man who was large enough to rival the planet.

This person was born with two horns, and he is also a great power of the Hades civilization.

He was talking about the spiritual path of the Hades civilization, that is, the way of the soul, and everyone else was listening to it.

Like everyone else, this preacher is as large as a planet, but it is also illusory.

"This is the picture of the sermon, presented to me!"

Ye Tian understood.

At this moment, the machine spirit appeared in front of him.

"Assessor, this is the sermon of a powerful person in our Hades civilization, the strength of this great power has reached the level of your universe supreme, and it is the soul supreme, if your universe does not have any special protection in the soul, maybe it will be killed by our soul supreme in seconds. The fifth round of assessment is to listen to the sermon of this soul supreme, and from his sermon, comprehend a secret art of the soul. Remember, it must be the secret art of the soul that you have learned based on this sermon, not the secret art of the soul that you have learned in the outside world. The Hades Temple has its own identification method, if you cheat, you will definitely be eliminated! As for the time, this time I will give you a longer time, a total of 3 years. "

Instrument Spirit Dao.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

After the machine spirit left, Ye Tian also sat cross-legged and listened carefully to the sermon of this soul supreme.

He had never been in contact with the way of the soul, and this time he was able to listen to a soul supreme talk about the way of the soul, which was definitely a great opportunity.

Even if he can't create a soul secret technique, he will definitely benefit a lot.

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian had been listening carefully to the content of this soul supreme's sermon, and while listening, he understood the truth in it.

And just like that, two and a half years passed.

During this period of time, Ye Tian had not tried to create the Soul Secret Technique, but had comprehended and comprehended the various spiritual paths spoken by the Soul Supreme, and even tried to understand the mysteries of every sentence and every word.

"It's almost time, it's time to use the last half year to create a soul secret technique!"

Ye Tian muttered.

For the standard of soul secret arts, the Hades civilization is much higher than this universe.

Some of the soul secret techniques of this universe are not qualified in the Hades civilization, and they can only be regarded as incomplete secret techniques, and they cannot be included in the assessment standards.

Therefore, Ye Tian had to create a soul secret technique that met the standards of the Hades civilization.

This one is very difficult, but Ye Tian must try it.

And the direction of the soul secret technique chosen by Ye Tian is the defensive secret technique, which is also a relatively simple type of secret technique, which is easier to create than some weird secret techniques.

If Ye Tian was asked to create that kind of secret technique that was rare in the middle of the door, he had almost no hope of creating it.

Day after day passed, during which Ye Tian failed again and again, but each failure brought Ye Tian some experience, allowing him to know where he was still missing.

Just when there were only ten days left on the deadline, Ye Tian finally created a soul defense secret technique.

"Realm Soul Technique!"

Airplanes!

A cube enchantment appeared around Ye Tian, enveloping his immortal soul.

This soul enchantment can protect one's soul from external damage, and its effect is even comparable to the effect of a pseudo-arcane soul defense talent.

"Detected that the examiner has successfully created the Soul Secret Technique, the assessment is successful!"

The voice of the machine spirit came.

Then, the machine spirit appeared in front of Ye Tian, looked at Ye Tian with a slightly surprised look, and said, "Yes, you really passed the fourth round of assessment, and you are much stronger than the so-called ghost clan." Then there is a fifth round of assessment, this fifth round of assessment does not test strength, does not assess the understanding of the soul, but only assesses the potential of the soul. You could have made it past the fourth round of the assessment, and the potential is definitely strong, but you still need to test it. If the potential is very good, the Hades Temple will even give you a powerful inheritance, and you don't even need to go to the sixth round of assessment and the subsequent assessment. Therefore, the fifth round of assessment is crucial!"

"Got it!"

Ye Tianying said.

Wow!

The machine spirit took Ye Tian to a large hall, and there was a crystal ball in the center of the hall.

"Go up and hold the crystal ball, according to the potential, it will release different lights, the lowest level is white light, followed by red, blue and black, and then up is purple and gold, gold is the highest, but even in the era of Hades civilization, golden potential is extremely rare, and anyone who can reach purple potential is considered a top genius. Your universe is actually not suitable for cultivating the soul path, because the rules of the universe have changed, so the soul potential of the people of your universe should not be high. I think your potential is black at best, you don't underestimate the black potential, if you can reach the black potential, you can get a very powerful inheritance from the Hades Temple, even if the rules of the universe are suppressed, it can still make your soul strength reach a very terrifying level. "Instrument Spirit Dao.

Ye Tian didn't speak, but walked up and held the crystal ball with both hands.

Then, the crystal ball began to glow.

From the beginning of white light, it quickly turns into red light and blue light......

The machine spirit is not surprised, the potential of any person is revealed little by little, so it must start with white light, not turn black or purple all at once.

Soon, a black glow appeared on the crystal ball.

"Black potential, really not an ordinary person, he can get a good inheritance!"

Instrument Spirit Dao.

But soon, the machine spirit showed a look of surprise.

Because the black light is getting more and more intense, purple gradually appears, which is the potential of purple!

"Purple potential, in this universe where the rules of the universe have changed greatly, there are still creatures with purple potential, it's incredible. His soul strength is not strong, no, he has not cultivated the soul method, and his soul strength is not strong, which is really normal!"

The machine spirit muttered to himself.

However, purple potential is still not Ye Tian's limit.

When the purple light was extremely intense, a ray of golden light seeped out from the purple light in the sky.

At this moment, the machine spirit opened its mouth wide, revealing a look of disbelief.

"Golden Potential!"

The machine spirit shouted.

In the cosmic era where the Hades civilization is located, golden potential cultivators are extremely rare, and it is often difficult to give birth to a golden potential soul cultivator in an era.

And the Golden Potential also has a title - Future Soul Supreme!

Any soul cultivator with golden potential will definitely be able to become a soul supreme as long as they are not allowed in the future, while a person with purple potential only has a small chance of becoming a soul supreme.

This shows how rare soul cultivators with golden potential are.

If you compare the two cosmic eras, the golden potential is equivalent to the current Supreme Highness.

"I don't know how rich his golden light is, the richer the golden light, the stronger his potential, and an ordinary soul supreme is not the same as that peak soul supreme. The most terrifying soul supreme, even a single look can kill an ordinary soul supreme in seconds. The machine spirit thought to himself.

Whoa!!

The golden light became more and more intense, gradually filling the entire hall.

"This ...... No way!"

The machine spirit shouted.

The intensity of this golden light was beyond his comprehension, and he had never seen such a rich golden light potential from the records of the Hades Temple.

Time passed little by little, but the golden light did not stop spreading, and it was still soaring wildly.

Suddenly.

A clicking sound attracted the attention of Ye Tian and the machine spirit, and the eyes of one person and one machine spirit looked at the crystal ball.

A crack appeared on the crystal ball that was originally crystal clear, and this crack was getting bigger and bigger.

"It's going to break!"

This thought was presented in Ye Tian's mind.
